name: org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin
description: bindex-maven-plugin is a Maven plugin that integrates Machai Bindex tooling into Maven builds to automate generation, update, cleanup, and registration of Bindex metadata for Maven projects in the Machanism ecosystem. It provides Maven Mojo goals that (1) create a new Bindex index for a module, (2) update/refresh an existing index incrementally, (3) scan and register project metadata to an external registry endpoint, and (4) clean temporary artifacts created by Bindex/Machai. The plugin is intended for Java/Maven multi-module builds and skips modules with packaging type "pom" (typically parent/aggregator modules). Configuration includes selecting a GenAI provider/model identifier via -Dgw.genai.model (e.g., "OpenAI:gpt-5"). Credentials for GenAI can optionally be loaded from Maven settings.xml by specifying -Dgw.genai.serverId=<serverId>, which reads <server><username> and <password> and maps them to workflow properties GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD. For indexing operations, the plugin constructs a MavenProjectLayout from the module base directory and Maven model and delegates processing to Machai's bindex-core (BindexCreator for create/update, BindexRegister for registry publishing). The register goal publishes metadata to a configurable registry database URL via -Dbindex.register.url (defaulting to the bindex-core repository default). The clean goal removes temporary inputs logs under the .machai directory (e.g., .machai/bindex-inputs.txt). Typical usage: mvn org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin:create -Dgw.genai.model=OpenAI:gpt-5; mvn ...:update -Dgw.genai.model=OpenAI:gpt-5; mvn ...:register -Dgw.genai.model=OpenAI:gpt-5 -Dbindex.register.url=http://localhost:8080; mvn ...:clean.

usageContext: Maven build lifecycle (INSTALL and CLEAN phases)
CI/CD pipelines for automated metadata generation and publishing
Multi-module Maven projects (skips pom packaging modules)

constructors.description: Runs the Maven goal that creates a new Bindex index/resources for the current module. Uses the configured GenAI model (gw.genai.model) and optional credentials from settings.xml (gw.genai.serverId). Skips modules with packaging "pom". Delegates to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator with a Maven project layout built from the module basedir and Maven model.

examples.description: Create Bindex index for the current Maven module using the specified GenAI provider/model.
Create Bindex index and load GenAI credentials from ~/.m2/settings.xml <server> entry with id "my-genai-server".

constructors.description: Runs the Maven goal that updates/refreshes an existing Bindex index/resources for the current module (incremental update). Uses the configured GenAI model and optional settings.xml credentials. Skips modules with packaging "pom". Delegates to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator in update mode.

examples.description: Update (refresh) Bindex index for the current Maven module.

constructors.description: Runs the Maven goal that scans the project folder and registers/publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint. Uses the configured GenAI model and optional settings.xml credentials, and a registry URL (bindex.register.url). Skips modules with packaging "pom". Delegates to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRegister, optionally running update behavior before scanning.

examples.description: Scan the current module and publish Bindex metadata to the specified registry URL.

constructors.description: Runs the Maven goal that removes temporary artifacts generated by Machai/Bindex tooling for the project, currently deleting the inputs log file under .machai (e.g., .machai/bindex-inputs.txt).

examples.description: Remove the Machai/Bindex temporary inputs log file from the project.

features.name: create
features.description: Maven goal (default phase INSTALL) that creates a new Bindex index and related resources for the current module using Machai bindex-core. Skips pom-packaged modules. Uses -Dgw.genai.model to select the GenAI provider/model and can optionally load credentials from settings.xml via -Dgw.genai.serverId. Logs GenAI provider usage after execution.

examples.description: Generate a new Bindex index for the module.

features.name: update
features.description: Maven goal (default phase INSTALL) that updates/refreshes an existing Bindex index (incremental mode) for the current module using Machai bindex-core. Skips pom-packaged modules. Uses -Dgw.genai.model for GenAI provider/model selection and optional settings.xml credentials via -Dgw.genai.serverId. Logs GenAI provider usage after execution.

features.name: register
features.description: Maven goal (default phase INSTALL) that scans the project folder and registers/publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint. Controlled by -Dbindex.register.url (defaults to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRepository.DB_URL) and an update flag (default true). Skips pom-packaged modules. Logs GenAI provider usage after execution.

examples.description: Publish module metadata to a registry service endpoint.

features.name: clean
features.description: Maven goal (default phase CLEAN) that removes temporary artifacts generated by Bindex/Machai for the project, currently deleting .machai/bindex-inputs.txt if present.

examples.description: Delete the Machai/Bindex inputs log file under the .machai directory.

features.name: settings.xml credentials loading
features.description: Builds a workflow properties configurator and optionally loads GenAI credentials (username/password) from Maven settings.xml using a configured server id (gw.genai.serverId). Maps these values to GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD for downstream Machai bindex-core operations.

examples.description: Run an indexing goal while loading credentials from ~/.m2/settings.xml <server id="my-genai-server">.

examples.name: Create Bindex index
examples.description: Creates Bindex index/resources for the current module during the Maven build.

examples.name: Update Bindex index
examples.description: Refreshes an existing Bindex index/resources for the current module.

examples.name: Register metadata to a registry
examples.description: Scans the project and publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint.

examples.name: Clean temporary artifacts
examples.description: Deletes Machai/Bindex temporary inputs log file under .machai.
